MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, July 15, 2025, in Department 304, Line 3.

Appearances: Kimberly Chu of Brayton Purcell via Zoom; and
Plaintiff David Harness in person.

The Court hold in camera hearing with counsel and plaintiff. Upon conclusion of hearing, the court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAVID HARNESS MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. Order signed in open court. The court refers Mr. Harness to the California Bar Association to assist with his search for new representation. Judge: Ethan P. Schulman. Clerk: Johnny Sengmany. Reporter: NOT REPORTED (304/EPS).
